---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your request related to a frustration you have?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

How would you use this feature? Who else would benefit?

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking my use of the product)
- [ ] High (significantly improves my workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or any other relevant information.
